mapper.select:
SELECT u.id AS `key`, u.fullName AS name, u.customAvatar AS avatar, DATE_FORMAT(u.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') AS joinDate, u.classId AS classId,
COALESCE(word_stats.wordCount, 0) AS words, CASE WHEN COALESCE(word_stats.wordCount, 0) > 20 THEN 5 WHEN COALESCE(word_stats.wordCount, 0) > 5 THEN 4 ELSE 3 END AS stars, COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(log_stats.lastActiveTime, '%Y-%m-%d'), '暂无活动') AS lastActive
FROM Users u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT studentId, COUNT(DISTINCT wordId) AS wordCount FROM Student_Words GROUP BY studentId ) AS word_stats ON u.id = word_stats.studentId LEFT JOIN ( SELECT studentId, MAX(createdAt) AS lastActiveTime FROM Learning_Logs GROUP BY studentId ) AS log_stats ON u.id = log_stats.studentId WHERE u.classId IN
#{classId}
AND u.role = 'student'
ORDER BY u.createdAt DESC
